INVOKE.COMMENT: call member challenges api call service
check if same challenge is active during given effective date

BRANCH.COMMENT: check if same challenge is in progress

MAP.NAME: true
MAP.COMMENT: challenge not eligible since it is already in progress

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to check whether challenge is already in progress

record.name: type
